log: === INITIATIVE ===
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: 17 (d20:15 + 2)
Young Red Dragon: 10 (d20:10 + 0)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 12] HIT! 24 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 133/157
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 32 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 35/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
⚡ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:4 total 14 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Dragonborn — Bardic Musician for 8. HP: 22/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
⚡ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:7 total 17 vs AC 14 — still hits.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 11 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Misty Step (2nd level)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
